# Range Medical
> Regenerative medicine and health optimization clinic in Newport Beach, California.

## Basic Info
- Name: Range Medical
- Type: Regenerative medicine clinic
- Address: 1901 Westcliff Dr. Suite 10, Newport Beach, CA 92660
- Phone: (949) 997-3988
- Website: https://www.range-medical.com
- Hours: Monday-Friday, 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM
- Google Rating: 5.0 stars (90+ reviews)

## Services Offered
- Hormone Optimization (HRT) - $250/month all-inclusive membership
- Medical Weight Loss - Tirzepatide, Semaglutide, Retatrutide
- Peptide Therapy - BPC-157, TB-500, growth hormone peptides
- IV Therapy - Custom vitamin infusions, NAD+ therapy
- Hyperbaric Oxygen Therapy (HBOT) - Recovery and cognitive enhancement
- Red Light Therapy - Photobiomodulation for recovery and skin health
- PRP Therapy - Platelet-rich plasma for joint and tissue repair
- Exosome Therapy - Cell signaling for systemic regeneration
- Lab Panels - Essential ($350) and Elite ($750) hormone panels
- Injection Therapy - B12, glutathione, amino acid shots
- Injury Recovery - Regenerative treatments for sports and chronic injuries

## Areas Served
Newport Beach, Costa Mesa, Irvine, Huntington Beach, Laguna Beach, Dana Point,
San Clemente, Tustin, Lake Forest, Mission Viejo, Laguna Niguel, Orange County CA

## How to Get Started
1. Start with a Range Assessment to discuss symptoms and goals
2. Comprehensive lab work to understand your baseline
3. Provider reviews results and designs a personalized plan
4. Begin treatment with ongoing monitoring and support

Book an assessment: https://www.range-medical.com/range-assessment

For full service details, pricing, and FAQs: https://www.range-medical.com/llms-full.txt
